moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage is in full swing, with major matches taking place across North America this week, including England's crucial fixtures.

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: England are deep into their World Cup group stage matches this week! Will they make it through to the knockouts? Keep up with all the action.

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is delivering non-stop drama! Who are you backing to go all the way? Catch the latest scores and highlights.

moments.title: HSBC Championships at Queen's Club
moments.blurb: The prestigious HSBC Championships at Queen's Club in London continues this week, bringing top tennis talent to the capital ahead of Wimbledon.

angles.name: London Tennis Buzz
angles.copy: The grass court season is in full swing! Head to Queen's Club for the HSBC Championships – who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: With Wimbledon just around the corner, the HSBC Championships are a vital warm-up. Catch the stars in action before SW19!

moments.title: Lexus Nottingham Open Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Lexus Nottingham Open, a key event in the grass court tennis season, is reaching its climax this week, with finals set for Sunday.

angles.name: Nottingham Tennis Showdown
angles.copy: It's finals week at the Lexus Nottingham Open! Who will lift the trophy on Sunday? Get down to the Nottingham Tennis Centre!

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: Another exciting week of grass court tennis concludes at the Lexus Nottingham Open. Perfect prep for the big one later this month!

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, falls on Sunday, June 21st, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this Sunday! It's the longest day of the year, officially ushering in summer. How will you make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Sun's Peak
angles.copy: The sun reaches its highest point this Sunday for the Summer Solstice. Time to embrace those long summer evenings and good vibes!

moments.title: Golowan Festival Kicks Off in Penzance
moments.blurb: The vibrant Golowan Festival, Penzance's traditional midsummer celebration, begins this Friday, June 19th, bringing music, dance, and community spirit to Cornwall.

angles.name: Penzance Party Time
angles.copy: It's almost time for Golowan! Penzance comes alive this Friday with music, parades, and pure Cornish celebration. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Ready for some midsummer magic? Penzance's Golowan Festival starts this week, celebrating the solstice with incredible community spirit and fun!

moments.title: Darcey Bussell's Wild Coasts of Scotland
moments.blurb: Dame Darcey Bussell explores Scotland's stunning coastline in a new documentary series, 'Darcey Bussell's Wild Coasts of Scotland', premiering on BritBox this Friday, June 18th.

angles.name: Scottish Scenery
angles.copy: Dame Darcey Bussell takes us on a breathtaking journey along Scotland's Wild Coasts this Friday on BritBox. Perfect viewing for a cosy night in!

angles.name: TV Travelogue
angles.copy: Escape to the beautiful Scottish coastline with Darcey Bussell's new series, dropping this Friday on BritBox. Who's watching?

moments.title: The Woman in the Wall Premieres on BritBox
moments.blurb: The acclaimed drama 'The Woman in the Wall', starring Ruth Wilson, arrives on BritBox this Friday, June 18th, delving into dark secrets and a gripping mystery.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Ruth Wilson's 'The Woman in the Wall' hits BritBox this Friday! Get ready for a chilling mystery that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge-watch? 'The Woman in the Wall' arrives on BritBox this Friday. Prepare for a gripping drama!

moments.title: Saving Britain's Country Houses with Penelope Keith
moments.blurb: Dame Penelope Keith returns to our screens in 'Saving Britain's Country Houses', a new series exploring the efforts to preserve historic estates, premiering on BritBox on June 24th.

angles.name: Heritage TV
angles.copy: Dame Penelope Keith is back! Join her on June 24th on BritBox as she explores the incredible work to save Britain's Country Houses. A must-watch for history buffs.

angles.name: Grand Designs of the Past
angles.copy: Love a good stately home? Penelope Keith's new series, 'Saving Britain's Country Houses', starts June 24th on BritBox. Take a peek into these magnificent estates.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Ice Cube!
moments.blurb: Legendary rapper, actor, and producer Ice Cube turns 57 today, June 15th, celebrating a career that spans decades of influence in music and film.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Ice Cube! From N.W.A to Hollywood, a true hip-hop icon.

angles.name: Straight Outta Compton
angles.copy: It's Ice Cube's 57th birthday! What's your favourite track from the legendary rapper and actor?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Noddy Holder!
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of Slade, Noddy Holder, celebrates his 79th birthday today, June 15th, known for his powerful vocals and festive hits.

angles.name: Glam Rock Legend
angles.copy: IT'S CHRIIIIISTMAAS! Oh wait, it's Noddy Holder's 79th Birthday! Happy Birthday to the legendary Slade frontman!

angles.name: Slade Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Noddy Holder! What's your favourite Slade classic?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Russell Hitchcock!
moments.blurb: Russell Hitchcock, the distinctive voice of soft rock duo Air Supply, turns 77 today, June 15th, known for their timeless love ballads.

angles.name: Air Supply Vocalist
angles.copy: Making love out of nothing at all! Happy 77th Birthday to Russell Hitchcock of Air Supply! What's your favourite power ballad?

angles.name: Soft Rock Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to Russell Hitchcock! His voice defined an era of soft rock hits.

moments.title: Happy 35th Birthday, John Newman!
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter John Newman, known for his powerful soulful voice and hit tracks like 'Love Me Again', celebrates his 35th birthday tomorrow, June 16th.

angles.name: Soulful Vocals
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Love Me Again'! Tomorrow is John Newman's 35th Birthday! What's your favourite track from the soulful singer?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating John Newman's 35th! Send us your birthday wishes for the 'Blame' singer!

moments.title: Happy 64th Birthday, Jimmy Somerville!
moments.blurb: The distinctive falsetto voice of Bronski Beat and The Communards, Jimmy Somerville, turns 64 tomorrow, June 16th, a true icon of 80s pop and dance.

angles.name: 80s Dance Legend
angles.copy: Smalltown Boy, big voice! Happy 64th Birthday to the incredible Jimmy Somerville tomorrow! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Communards Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the one and only Jimmy Somerville's 64th Birthday! His vocals are still as iconic as ever.

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday, Cyndi Lauper!
moments.blurb: The pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant personality and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: She's so unusual! Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper on June 22nd! What's your go-to Cyndi track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday on June 22nd! Her music still gets everyone dancing.

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Todd Rundgren!
moments.blurb: Innovative musician, singer-songwriter, and producer Todd Rundgren celebrates his 78th birthday on June 22nd, with a career spanning rock, pop, and electronic music.

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: He's a wizard, a true star! Happy 78th Birthday to the legendary Todd Rundgren on June 22nd! What's your favourite of his many projects?

angles.name: Producer Extraordinaire
angles.copy: Beyond his hits, Todd Rundgren shaped so much music! Wishing a Happy 78th Birthday to a true music pioneer on June 22nd.

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday, Solange Knowles!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning artist, singer-songwriter, and style icon Solange Knowles turns 40 on June 24th, celebrated for her innovative R&B and soul music.

angles.name: R&B Visionary
angles.copy: Celebrating a true artist! Happy 40th Birthday to the incredible Solange Knowles on June 24th! What's your favourite album?

angles.name: Style and Sound
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 40th Birthday to Solange Knowles on June 24th! Her unique sound and style continue to inspire.

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Curt Smith!
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the iconic new wave band Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Legend
angles.copy: Everybody wants to rule the world! Happy 65th Birthday to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears on June 24th! What's your favourite hit?

angles.name: New Wave Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 65th Birthday to Curt Smith! His voice is synonymous with some of the biggest 80s anthems.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, John Illsley!
moments.blurb: John Illsley, the bassist and co-founder of the legendary rock band Dire Straits, turns 77 on June 24th, known for their iconic guitar-driven sound.

angles.name: Dire Straits Bassist
angles.copy: Money for nothing! Happy 77th Birthday to John Illsley, the brilliant bassist of Dire Straits, on June 24th! What's your favourite album?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Dire Straits' John Illsley on June 24th! A key part of one of Britain's greatest bands.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Mick Fleetwood!
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, Mick Fleetwood, celebrates his 79th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Drummer
angles.copy: Don't stop thinking about tomorrow! Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Mick Fleetwood on June 24th! What's your all-time favourite Fleetwood Mac track?

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Mick Fleetwood! A true giant of rock music and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac.

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Carly Simon!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for her classic hits like 'You're So Vain', celebrates her 83rd birthday on June 25th.

angles.name: You're So Vain
angles.copy: Nobody does it better! Happy 83rd Birthday to the incredible Carly Simon on June 25th! What's your favourite of her iconic songs?

angles.name: Timeless Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to the legendary Carly Simon! Her music remains as powerful and relevant as ever.
